tagline: Elgin Homes Deserve Better Than Bugs
hero_subtitle: Professional pest control for the Fox River Valley. We protect your home and business with proven treatments, honest pricing, and guaranteed results.
service_area_description: Serving Elgin, St. Charles, Geneva, Batavia, Aurora, South Elgin, and communities throughout the Fox River Valley.
seo_title: Fox River Pest Defense | Pest Control in Elgin, IL
seo_description: Fox River Pest Defense in Elgin, IL. Professional residential and commercial pest control serving the Fox River Valley. Call 847-697-7200 for a free estimate.
services_subtitle: From termites to wildlife — complete pest management for homes and businesses across the Fox River Valley.
reviews_subtitle: See why homeowners across Elgin and the Fox River Valley choose us year after year.
cta_heading: One call. No more pests. That simple.
cta_subtitle: Get a free estimate and customized treatment plan from Elgin's trusted pest control team.
footer_description: Professional pest control serving Elgin and the Fox River Valley. Residential and commercial extermination, termite treatment, rodent control, and wildlife removal. Licensed and insured.

services_featured.name: General Pest Control
services_featured.description: Year-round protection from ants, roaches, spiders, and other common invaders. Quarterly plans that keep your home pest-free all season.

services_secondary.name: Termite Treatment
services_secondary.description: Advanced baiting and liquid barrier systems to detect and eliminate termites before they cause serious structural damage.

services_accent.name: Rodent Control
services_accent.description: Complete mouse and rat elimination. We trap, remove, and permanently seal entry points so rodents can't return.

services_wide.name: Wildlife Removal
services_wide.description: Humane removal of raccoons, squirrels, opossums, and other nuisance wildlife. We relocate safely and prevent re-entry.

about_features.title: Eco-Friendly Methods
about_features.description: We use integrated pest management and low-toxicity products that are effective on pests but safe for your family and the environment.

about_features.title: Licensed & Insured
about_features.description: Fully licensed by the State of Illinois. Every technician is trained, certified, and committed to professional service.

about_features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
about_features.description: If pests return between treatments, so do we — at no additional cost. That's our promise to every customer.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: We had a severe ant problem every summer. After one treatment, they were gone. The quarterly plan keeps our home completely pest-free.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Found termite damage in our basement. They treated the entire perimeter and set up monitoring. Professional, thorough, and fair pricing.

reviews.name: Karen W.
reviews.text: Raccoons in our attic — they removed them humanely, cleaned everything up, and sealed the entry points. Haven't had a problem since.
